qa_list.q: Criminal penalties for insider trading in China
qa_list.a: Article 180: serious cases up to 5 years + fine; particularly serious 5-10 years. Threshold 500K RMB.

qa_list.q: Criminal risk prevention for HNWIs in China
qa_list.a: Asset compliance + governance + isolation + emergency response. Prevention << defense costs.

qa_list.q: Legal requirements for investing in Shenzhen
qa_list.a: Negative List, VIE compliance, forex controls, data security. Due diligence recommended.

qa_list.q: Employee protections under Chinese labor law
qa_list.a: Overtime 1.5-3x, mutual agreement for changes, mandatory social insurance. 996 is illegal.
Civil Code Art.1087: protect children/wife/non-fault party. Virtual assets included.
Illegal forex transfer, money laundering, underground banking. Legal: ODI/QDLP/50K quota.
Administrative + criminal + civil. Independent directors and auditors jointly liable.
Under 2: mother. 2-8: court. Over 8: child preference respected.
Housing bureau complaint, contract breach, 2025 pre-sale fund supervision.
Arbitration recommended (New York Convention, 160+ countries). ICSID for govt disputes.
